verified.notes: Program is LIEAP (Low Income Energy Assistance Program), not LIHEAP. 2026 application period ended March 31, 2026. Income limits are monthly maximums at 150% of federal poverty level. verified.notes: Kansas Weatherization Assistance Program eligibility is based solely on income (verified documentation required); maximum income guidelines exist but specific dollar amounts are not provided in available sources. No age restrictions found. No asset limits identified in search results. Phone number obtained from Kansas Housing Resources Corporation (KHRC), the state administrator. Income guidelines and detailed eligibility criteria require direct contact with KHRC or local service providers.
